# Reel — working title

**Length:** _15–45s_ · **Aspect:** 9:16 (1080×1920)

## Hook (0–3s)

_The first 3 seconds decide retention. Make it impossible to scroll past._

## Shot list / script

| Time | Shot | Action / voiceover | On-screen text |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 0–3s | _hook_ | | |
| 3–10s | | | |
| 10–20s | | | |
| End | _CTA_ | | |

## Audio

- Track / trending sound: _name or link_

## Caption

_Short supporting caption._

**CTA:** _e.g. "Follow for more"_

> Save the final, ready-to-paste caption as `<slug>.caption.txt` (plain text, no
> Markdown) next to this file — that's what gets copied into Instagram.
